scenes.name: Land on visualizer
scenes.note: Hold on the empty stage so the viewer takes in the dark canvas, centered title, and the dock of controls along the bottom.

scenes.name: Open microphone input
scenes.note: Start the primary live demo path by enabling mic input so the canvas can react without uploading a file.

scenes.name: Notice live motion begins
scenes.note: Viewer should notice the visualizer wake up and begin responding to ambient sound, with BPM and reactive movement appearing on the canvas.

scenes.name: Switch to radial mode
scenes.note: Show that the same live audio instantly remaps into a different visual mode.

scenes.name: Observe circular composition
scenes.note: Notice the canvas transforms from the default bars layout into a more immersive circular radial pattern.

scenes.name: Change palette
scenes.note: Demonstrate one-click palette changes using one of the visible palette chips in the control row.

scenes.name: Observe palette lerp
scenes.note: Viewer should notice the smooth color transition rather than a harsh jump, reinforcing the polished palette interpolation.

scenes.name: Switch to tall export ratio
scenes.note: Show the aspect-ratio control by moving into the portrait format used for loops and social content.

scenes.name: Observe portrait framing
scenes.note: Notice the stage reframes into a vertical composition while preserving the animated response.

scenes.name: Try a more intricate mode
scenes.note: Highlight another signature look to emphasize the range of seven visualizer modes.

scenes.name: Observe constellation behavior
scenes.note: Viewer should notice points and connective motion reacting differently to the same sound input.

scenes.name: Hover export loop control
scenes.note: Call attention to the one-click portrait loop export without actually triggering recording.
